step_by_step_thinking:

Given that the villagers show reluctance towards following instructions even after multiple referrals and persuasive reminders, this might suggest deeper social or cultural factors influencing their behavior, potentially going beyond just individual motivations or stages of change addressed by the Trans-Theoretical Model alone.
